title.v: số phát sinh lũy kế đầu kỳ của các vụ việc

command.text: declare @inputYearOpening int select @inputYearOpening = case when month(ngay_ky1) = month(ngay_dn2) and day(ngay_ky1) = day(ngay_dn2) then 0 else 1 end from dmstt select 'this._inputYearOpening=' + case when @inputYearOpening = 1 then 'true' else 'false' end + '; setFormJobAccumulation(this); activeJobAccumulation(this);' as message return

declare @message nvarchar(4000), @startYear int, @unitName nvarchar(1023) select @startYear = nam_bd from dmstt select @unitName = case when @@language = 'v' then ten_dvcs else ten_dvcs2 end from dmdvcs where ma_dvcs = @@unit select @message = 'this._startYear=' + rtrim(@startYear) + ';this._unitCode=''' + @@unit + ''';this._unitName=''' + replace(replace(isnull(@unitName, ''), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + '''; initJobAccumulation(this);' &CommandWhenBalanceBeforeEdit; select @message as message return
declare @message nvarchar(4000) select @message = 'initJobAccumulation(this);' &CommandWhenBalanceBeforeEdit; select @message as message return

declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã đã có hoặc lồng nhau hoặc không hợp lệ.' else N'This code invalid or already exists' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Bản ghi hiện thời đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'This item has been modified or deleted by another user.' end

if exists(select * from @@table where ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs and nam = @nam and ma_vv = @ma_vv and tk = @tk) begin select @$exists as message return end select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

if not exists(select * from @@table where ma_dvcs = $ma_dvcs.OldValue and nam = $nam.OldValue and ma_vv = $ma_vv.OldValue and tk = $tk.OldValue) begin select @$recordHasBeenChanged as message return end
if @ma_dvcs <> $ma_dvcs.OldValue or @nam <> $nam.OldValue or @ma_vv <> $ma_vv.OldValue or @tk <> $tk.OldValue begin if exists(select * from @@table where (not (ma_dvcs = $ma_dvcs.OldValue and nam = $nam.OldValue and ma_vv = $ma_vv.OldValue and tk = $tk.OldValue)) and (ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs and nam = @nam and ma_vv = @ma_vv and tk = @tk)) begin select @$exists as message return end end
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs and nam = @nam and ma_vv = @ma_vv and tk = @tk
